channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipping on corner of Ripon and Cantwell, 24th May
item.description:
Household waste, general

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cantwell Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A fridge and other waste has been dumped outside St Owen House overnight, 24th May
item.description:
A Fridge, a bath panel and other waste has been dumped outside St Owen House overnight.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Abbey Street, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Regular fly tip by residents, 24th May
item.description:
Virtually every week the residents that live above the pizza or chicken shop dump waste here. It’s been ongoing for months. Please can a letter drop be done regarding fly tipping to these addresses?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 161, Masons Hill, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish tipped on floor and near the intercom door, 24th May
item.description:
Outside flat 1 Danby house window, rubbish being throw into a section that is attached the flat outside the intercom door. Rubbish landing on the grass in front of flat 1 Danby house window. may have been happening for longer but I only moved in 20th April

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Frampton Park Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter and general rubbish., 24th May
item.description:
Brixton Station Rd is entirely covered in litter. It’s a disgrace. Can you please arrange for street cleaning to remove the litter, bin bags and general rubbish.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 24, Brixton Station Road, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blood all over ground floor & lift in St Owen House, 24th May
item.description:
Over night blood has been splattered all over the ground floor lift lobby, the wall and in the lift and on the lift buttons.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Abbey Street, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass seeds, 24th May
item.description:
Please arrange for the grass seeds around all sides of Stanhope Rec, including the area alongside the basketball court, to be removed and taken away asap. Many dog walkers (including myself) have had to have seeds removed from their dogs ears and paws over the years. They cause extreme pain to the dogs as well as an expensive vet bill to the owners. There's also broken glass near the basketball area and by the pavilion which are a dangerous hazard to children and animals. Many thanks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 87, Stanhope Grove, Upper Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: There is now sand and a big water leak, 24th May
item.description:
The rubble and been removed and replaced with a pile of sand that has been on the road for two days accompanied with a huge water leak that is going all over the pavement and road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Dorset Road, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog poo, 24th May
item.description:
Someone hasn't cleaned up after their dog
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 53, Beckenham Road, Beckenham, Greater London

item.title: Dog poo, 24th May
item.description:
Someone hasn't cleaned up after their dog

item.title: Scumbag residence, 24th May
item.description:
Please have this removed, so I have a scumbag residence. Don’t do the same thing.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Swan Walk, Enfield

item.title: Litter picker needed, 24th May
item.description:
Please pick up this litter

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Colegrove Road, Peckham, Greater London

item.title: Grass needs cutting, 24th May
item.description:
All of the grass needs cutting as there are so many grass seeds which r extremely dangerous to all of the dogs who go on their walks there. The grass cutting need to be removed too please.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 103, Stanhope Grove, Upper Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Frequent littering, 24th May
item.description:
Residents are dealing with continuous littering on and around the roundabout and the patch of grass in the middle of the road. Could we please have a rubbish bin installed to reduce the litter problem?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Forest Way, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of overgrown grass, 24th May
item.description:
Log grass is bad for the dogs and ticks grass seeds etc
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stanhope Grove, Upper Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 9498818, 24th May
item.description:
I sent incorrect “what three words” should be. bind.chin.rare Thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 226, Erith Road, Barnehurst, Bexleyheath, Greater London

item.title: Dead baby fox at this location, 24th May

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cator Road, Penge, Greater London

item.title: Fly-tipped waste, 24th May
item.description:
There are two black rubbish bags filled with what appears to be garden waste dumped against the tree, on the patch of grass in the middle of the road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Forest Way, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
